title: Chive Smoke Quirk
description: A quick and crispy Portuguese snack made with chives, smoke flavoring, and a hint of sourness, perfect for snacking on the go.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chopped fresh chives
ingredients.notes: Chop finely to enhance flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons smoke flavoring (liquid or solid)
ingredients.notes: Can be found in cooking sections of supermarkets or online stores.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup sour cream (optional for additional tanginess, not essential for egg-free version)
Salt and black pepper to taste
Pinch of sugar (optional)
ingredients.notes: To balance the sourness and enhance overall flavor.

instructions: In a small mixing bowl, combine the chopped chives with the smoke flavoring. Mix well to ensure an even distribution of smoke taste.
If using sour cream for tanginess, add it to the mixture and mix thoroughly until combined evenly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Optionally, add sugar if desired for a balanced flavor profile.
Use your hands or a spoon to form small balls from the mixture and flatten them slightly.
You can press the flattened mixture into small molds or shapes for added presentation, if preferred.
